title: galium commune subvar. laeve
intro: Galium commune subvar. laeve, also known as smooth bedstraw, is a perennial herb in the bedstraw family (Galiumaceae) that is native to Europe and western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and calm digestive issues, reduce fever, and treat wounds. The health benefits of Galium commune subvar. laeve include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to act as a natural antacid and diuretic. Galium commune subvar. laeve can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and dried extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
